name: the-5-to-9
description: Clock in a full night-shift crew of AI role-agents that refine goals, work a beads backlog in parallel, and ralph-loop your repo to done — hands-off, with hard gates only on irreversible actions. NOTE: native Cursor runtime support is phase-2; today this manifest documents the adapter path, while the portable core (AGENTS.md + skills + scripts + MCP) runs in any AGENTS.md-aware agent.

interface.shortDescription: The shift that works while you're off the clock.
interface.longDescription: The 5 to 9 clocks in a night-shift crew of AI role-agents — the Owner (strategy), the Pit Boss (orchestrator/lead), the Cage Cashier (integration/merge gate), the Dealer (developer, TDD), the Floor Auditor (QA/independent verifier), the Eye in the Sky (security), and the Floorman (devops) — to work a beads backlog in parallel and ralph-loop a repo to done. It runs hands-off but hard-gates irreversible outward actions (prod/remote deploy, publishing a release or package, force-push, deleting remote data, destroying or rotating secrets); everything reversible just proceeds on a dedicated shift branch. Cursor runtime support is phase-2: the portable core (AGENTS.md + skills + scripts + MCP) already works in AGENTS.md-aware agents, while plugin hook/agent wiring stays Claude-Code-native for now.
defaultPrompt: clock in and take the night shift on this repo
